positive: A breathtaking celestial jungle scene, featuring hyper-stylized, bioluminescent flora and fauna against a deep cosmic void background. The composition should be central and symmetrical, dominated by large, stylized jungle leaves (like monstera and palm fronds) intertwined with glowing nebulae patterns and geometric constellations. Use a palette of deep sapphire blue, ethereal teal, vibrant magenta, and touches of neon lime green. The art style should be a blend of Art Deco symmetry and vibrant bioluminescent watercolor illustration, ensuring clean silhouettes and extremely high contrast suitable for screen printing on apparel. The lighting should be dramatic and emanating from the subjects themselves, creating strong outlines and depth.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, cartoon, childish, dirty, cluttered, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, grayscale
